ddls:
CREATE TABLE "carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carrier */,
  "carrier_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the carrier (airline) */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the carrier (airline) */,
  "hub_airport" TEXT /* Code of the main hub airport for the carrier */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the carrier was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Total number of aircraft in the carrier's fleet */,
  "fleet_average_age" REAL /* Average age of the aircraft in the carrier's fleet */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the carrier's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "terminal_count" INTEGER /* Number of terminals at the airport */,
  "gate_count" INTEGER /* Number of gates at the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "weather_type" TEXT /* Type of weather condition */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the weather station */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., N, NE, E) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount in millimeters */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_weather_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_station_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nas" (
  "nas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NAS record */,
  "nas_condition" TEXT /* Description of the NAS condition */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the NAS data */,
  "affected_airports" TEXT /* List of affected airports */,
  "affected_airlines" TEXT /* List of affected airlines */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the NAS condition in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nas_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security record */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of security condition */,
  "security_condition" TEXT /* Description of the security condition */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the security data */,
  "affected_airports" TEXT /* List of affected airports */,
  "affected_airlines" TEXT /* List of affected airlines */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the security condition in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)
column_names: Code of the main hub airport for the carrier
Total number of aircraft in the carrier's fleet
Average age of the aircraft in the carrier's fleet
City where the airport is located
State where the airport is located
Country where the airport is located

Number of gates at the airport
Unique identifier for each weather record

Duration of the security condition in minutes
